Name: Keystone Tutors
Tagline: With tutors based in London and online, Keystone Tutors is the UK's leading private tutoring company. Our tutors have proven track records in the UK’s most competitive entrance and national exams.
About: London: +44 (0)207 602 5310 | Hong Kong: +852 3704 4817 | Singapore: +65 3157 6543 We offer effective, and bespoke, one-to-one homeschooling tuition tailored to your child's learning needs. Our large team of expert tutors work with each individual child to help them achieve their academic goals.
Philosophy: Keystone Tutors focuses on personalized, one-to-one tuition, adapting to each student's unique learning style. Our approach emphasizes building confidence and academic excellence, preparing students for competitive exams and prestigious university admissions such as Oxbridge and Russell Group institutions.
Outcomes: Oli is an experienced tutor and a Cambridge graduate with a first class degree. He joined Keystone in 2010 and has tutored over 10,000 hours, helping over 320 students across the age range.
Admissions: Please fill out our online application form at the bottom of the page. We welcome - and read - all applications.
Quote: I am happy to support the work of Keystone. Their tutors are able to complement the efforts of the classroom teacher - to the overall benefit of the student.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Keystone Tutors boasts a team of highly qualified educators, including Oxbridge graduates and professionals with extensive teaching experience, all of whom hold DBS certifications to ensure student safety and quality education.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Keystone Tutors prioritizes student wellbeing through a dedicated pastoral care system, offering personalized support and access to counseling services to ensure a balanced and nurturing learning environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum at Keystone Tutors is tailored to individual needs, covering A-Levels, GCSEs, and IB, with specialized instruction in subjects like mathematics and sciences using innovative teaching methods.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Keystone Tutors has a strong track record of student success, with many graduates gaining admission to prestigious universities such as Oxbridge and Russell Group institutions, reflecting high exam performance and comprehensive preparation.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Located in West Kensington, Keystone Tutors provides a conducive learning environment with access to modern educational resources, ensuring students have the tools needed for effective one-to-one tuition.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Keystone Tutors maintains high standards through regular progress reports and parent consultations, ensuring transparency and continuous improvement, supported by positive ISI inspection outcomes.
